title: chorispermum exscapum
intro: Chorispermum exscapum, also known as False Rue, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Apiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Chorispermum exscapum include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
